# __LIMESTONE \(Calcium Carbonate\)__

## __About__

Limestone ek natural stone hai jo calcium carbonate \(CaCO3\) se bana hota hai\.  
Ye samundar ke shells aur minerals se banta hai\.

## __Colour__

- White 
- Light Grey 
- Kabhi kabhi yellowish

![](data:image/png;base64,)

White colour Lime stone

![](data:image/png;base64,)

Yellow colour Limestone

![](data:image/png;base64,)

Light Grey Colour Limestone

## __Specifications__

- CaCO3: 85% ΓÇô 98% 
- MgCO3: 0% ΓÇô 5% 
- SiO2: 1% ΓÇô 10% 
- Color: White / Grey 
- Form: Lumps / Powder 

### __Size__

- 0ΓÇô5 mm \(Powder\) 
- 5ΓÇô20 mm 
- 20ΓÇô50 mm 
- Custom size available 

## __Use \(Application\)__

- Cement industry \(main use\) 
- Steel plant \(iron cleaning\) 
- Construction \(road, building\) 
- Agriculture \(soil improve\) 
- Chemical industry 

###  __Calcined Limestone kya hota hai?__

 Calcined limestone ka simple meaning hai:  
__Limestone \(CaCOΓéâ\) ko high temperature \(900ΓÇô1100┬░C\) par heat karke jo product banta hai, use calcined limestone ya quicklime kehte hain\.__

###  Chemical change:

__CaCOΓéâ \(Limestone\) ΓåÆ CaO \(Quicklime\) \+ COΓéé__

##  __Purity kya hoti hai?__

Calcined limestone \(quicklime\) ki purity raw stone aur kiln process par depend karti hai:

###  Industrial grades:

- __High purity:__ 90% ΓÇô 95% CaO 
- __Standard industrial:__ 85% ΓÇô 90% CaO 
- __Low grade:__ 75% ΓÇô 85% CaO 

 Impurities:

- SiOΓéé \(silica\) 
- MgO \(magnesia\) 
- AlΓééOΓéâ 

 Steel & ferro industries me __high CaO \(90%\+\) preferred hota hai__

##  __Kahan\-kahan use hota hai?__

### 1\.  Steel Industry

- Steel purification \(impurities remove karna\) 
- Slag formation 

### 2\.  Ferro Alloys \(Ferro Silicon etc\.\)

- Furnace me impurities absorb karta hai 
- Slag control ke liye use hota hai 

### 3\.  Chemical Industry

- Calcium compounds banane me 

### 4\.  Water Treatment

- Water ko clean aur neutralize karne ke liye 

### 5\.  Cement Industry

- Cement manufacturing me raw material 

### 6\.  Agriculture \(limited use\)

- Soil pH balance karne ke liye

__where different limestone lump sizes are used__

__Size Range__

__Type__

__Where It Is Used__

__Purpose__

0ΓÇô5 mm

   Powder /  Fines

   Cement industry, paints,   agriculture, FGD

    Filling, soil treatment, pollution control

5ΓÇô20 mm

 Small chips

    Poultry feed, construction,    chemical industry

    Calcium source, mixing, small processes

20ΓÇô50 mm

  Medium  lumps

     Steel plants, chemical plants

     Flux material, chemical      reactions

50ΓÇô100 mm

  Large lumps

     Kilns, furnaces

      Lime production \(better     heat flow\)

100ΓÇô300 mm

 Very large  lumps

      Shaft kilns  

      Used for making quicklime

## __India me kaha milta hai__

India me limestone yaha milta hai:

- Rajasthan \(sabse best quality\) 
- Madhya Pradesh 
- Chhattisgarh 
- Gujarat 
- Andhra Pradesh 

## __World me kaha milta hai__

- India 
- China 
- Vietnam 
- Turkey 
- UAE 

## __Purity Difference \(India Usa Vietnam Turkey UAE China\)__

## __India__

- CaCO3: 90%ΓÇô98% \(Rajasthan best\) 
- Quality: High purity 
- Cost: Low 
- Supply: Bulk me available 
- Best for: Cement, Steel, Export 

 India ka material __cheap \+ high quality \+ bulk__ hota hai

## __China__

- CaCO3: 85%ΓÇô95% 
- Quality: Medium to high 
- Cost: Medium to high 
- Form: Mostly powder 

 China me processing achhi hoti hai, but cost jyada padta hai

## __Vietnam__

- CaCO3: 90%ΓÇô97% 
- Quality: Good white limestone 
- Cost: Medium 

 Mostly filler aur powder industry ke liye use hota hai

## __Turkey__

- CaCO3: 85%ΓÇô95% 
- Quality: Good 
- Cost: Medium 

 Europe market me zyada supply karta hai

## __UAE__

- CaCO3: 80%ΓÇô90% 
- Quality: Medium 
- Cost: High \(import bhi karte hain\) 

 UAE khud bhi import karta hai India se

## __Why Other Countries Buy from India__

- Price cheap hai 
- High purity material milta hai 
- Bulk quantity available 
- Export easy \(ports se\) 
- Reliable supply 

## __WHY BUYERS CHOOSE US__

Γ£ö Long term supply relationship focus, not only one time trade  
Γ£ö Buyer requirement ke hisaab se grade aur size customization  
Γ£ö Loading se pehle proper quality checking & inspection  
Γ£ö Time pe shipment dispatch ki full responsibility humari  
Γ£ö Port handling aur safe storage arrangement available  
Γ£ö Urgent requirement ke liye fast supply arrangement  
Γ£ö Full transparency with proper documentation in every shipment

## __PAYMENT & BUSINESS TERMS__

Γ£ö Payment terms flexible hai \(buyer trust aur volume ke hisaab se\)  
Γ£ö Advance / LC / partial payment options available  
Γ£ö Long term buyers ke liye better pricing aur priority supply

## __OUR HANDLING SYSTEM__

Γ£ö Hum already badi companies ko regular supply kar rahe hain  
Γ£ö Transport se leke port delivery tak complete handling hum karte hain  
Γ£ö Buyer ko kisi bhi logistics ya transport problem ka tension nahi hota  
Γ£ö Agar material import hota hai to port pe safe storage me rakha jata hai

## __SIMPLE LINE__

Hum sirf supplier nahi hain, hum complete supply chain partner hain ΓÇö mine se leke final delivery tak sab smooth aur reliable tarike se manage karte hain\.

# __INDIA vs OMAN LIMESTONE COMPARISON__

__Specification__

__India Limestone__

__Oman Limestone__

CaCO3 Content       

85% ΓÇô 98% \(Rajasthan up to 98%\)

90% ΓÇô 97%

Purity

High purity \(varies by mine\)

   Consistent good purity

Colour

White / Grey / Yellowish

   Mostly light grey / white

Form

Lumps \+ Powder

Mostly Lumps

Silica \(SiO2\)

1% ΓÇô 10%

   1% ΓÇô 5% \(generally lower\)

Moisture

Low to medium

Low

Availability

Very large reserves, multiple states

    Limited reserves but stable

Cost

Low cost

Medium to high cost

Mining Cost

Low

Higher than India

Export Advantage

Very competitive pricing \+ bulk supply     

            Good quality but higher price

Main Use    

Cement, Steel, Construction, Chemical

            Cement, Steel, Industrial use
